overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Last of Us showing Joel exploring an abandoned neoclassical building with marble columns and ornate architecture. The character transitions from a grand lobby through an archway into a sunlit corridor with overgrown vegetation, where Ellie is encountered near an ornate glass ceiling.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned neoclassical lobby with marble columns

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the decayed lobby, passing covered furniture and debris

entered.detail: tall marble columns supporting the ornate ceiling
large hanging chandelier with multiple tiers
furniture covered with dusty white sheets
deceased figure lying on the tiled floor
decorative arched passage with paneled doors
large faded painting on the upper wall

segments.scene_description: Joel walks through a grand abandoned lobby with tall classical marble columns and ornate architectural details. The space features covered furniture, a dead body on the floor, and faded wall murals, all lit by dim ambient light filtering through unseen windows.

scene_state.functional_zone: ornate archway transition to upper corridor

events.description: character enters the decorative arched passageway leaving the main lobby

agents.ego_description: walking through the archway into the narrower corridor beyond

entered.detail: ornate carved stone archway with decorative moldings
tall arched windows allowing natural light to enter
green vines creeping along the walls and balcony
stone balustrade along the upper level

segments.scene_description: The character moves from the open lobby through an ornate stone archway into a narrower corridor. Natural light begins to filter through large arched windows on the left, while overgrown ivy becomes visible climbing the walls and balcony railing on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: sunlit corridor with overgrown ivy and ornate glass ceiling

events.description: lighting brightens significantly as character approaches the large windows
Ellie appears standing near the wall looking up at the ceiling

agents.ego_description: walking through the corridor and looking up at the ornate glass ceiling, approaching Ellie

notable_agents.action: Ellie standing against the wall looking up at the glass ceiling, then turning to face Joel

entered.detail: intricate stained glass ceiling with circular geometric patterns
tall ornate floor lamp with multiple globes
portraits in gilded frames hanging on the wall

segments.scene_description: In the sunlit corridor, dense overgrown ivy covers the walls and ceiling around large arched windows. Ellie stands near the wall looking up at an ornate stained glass ceiling with circular patterns. The character approaches her while observing the intricate architectural details and vegetation overtaking the space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dim, decaying neoclassical lobby that gradually opens into a sunlit, vegetation-choked corridor. It begins by tracking Joel through a grand hall of marble columns and faded murals, passing covered furniture and a fallen body in the muted ambient light. As the camera moves forward, the space narrows through an ornate stone archway where the lighting shifts, introducing bright natural light from arched windows and the first signs of climbing ivy. The scene then expands into a bright corridor where dense greenery completely overtakes the walls and ceiling, finally bringing the character toward Ellie as she gazes up at an intricate stained glass ceiling.
